objectives.name: api-availability
objectives.measurement: successful / total API health and virtual sensor requests

objectives.name: collector-ingest-availability
objectives.measurement: accepted telemetry batches / submitted telemetry batches

objectives.name: virtual-sensor-freshness
objectives.measurement: covariance and principal-mode results fresher than 5 minutes

objectives.name: agent-probe-readiness
objectives.measurement: monitored Linux hosts reporting eBPF readiness metrics

objectives.name: secret-sync-readiness
objectives.measurement: ExternalSecret resources ready and target Secret keys present
